# kubefu_registered_user_schemas (Data Source)

Lists Terraform data source names registered from user-supplied schemas.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `names` (List of String) Registered data source names from user-supplied schemas.
